description: A logo for the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) featuring an emblem and text. The emblem on the left consists of a green graphic showing three vertical bars, resembling urban buildings or data charts, next to a stylized green ear of grain, all partially enclosed within a green arc. To the right of the emblem, the text "Land Monitoring Service" is displayed in two lines in green font, with "Land" on the upper line and "Monitoring Service" on the lower line.
